Class MenuItem

java.lang.Object
org.team55.model.MenuItem
public class MenuItem extends Object
Model class representing a menu item in the system. Contains properties for menu item ID, name, price, active status, and seasonal status.
Author:
Fernando Munoz Garza

  • Property Summary

    Properties
    Type
    Property
    Description
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleBooleanProperty
    active
    Gets the MenuItem's active status property for UI binding.

    Gets the MenuItem's ID property for UI binding.
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleStringProperty
    name
    Gets the MenuItem's name property for UI binding.
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleDoubleProperty
    price
    Gets the MenuItem's price property for UI binding.
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleBooleanProperty
    seasonalMenuItem
    Gets the MenuItem's seasonal menu item status property for UI binding.
